author: doll-agent
content: Add tests/property_tests.rs with 12 round-trip properties: 7 Arrow (i32/i64/u8/u32/f32/f64/bool) and 4 Polars (i32/i64/f64/bool) plus 1 arrow-length-preservation. proptest was a dev-dep but unused. Property modules gated behind feature flags so a default cargo test run skips them; arrow,polars features run all 12. Float round-trips check bit-exact via to_bits(). Polars f64 path filters out NaN inputs (Polars uses NaN-canonical equality).
